ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SF) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "raptor_box_total" REAL /* Total RAPTOR box score metric */,
  "raptor_onoff_total" REAL /* Total RAPTOR on-off court metric */,
  "raptor_offense" REAL /* RAPTOR offensive metric */,
  "raptor_defense" REAL /* RAPTOR defensive metric */,
  "raptor_total" REAL /* Total RAPTOR metric */,
  "war_reg_season" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement (WAR) for the regular season */,
  "raptor_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player based on RAPTOR metrics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ends */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Date the regular season starts */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Date the playoffs start */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "playoffs_end" TEXT /* Date the playoffs end */,
  "all_star_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the All-Star Game */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the season's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was on */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., RAPTOR, WAR) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player based on the metric */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ranking record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Whether the role can view data */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Whether the role can edit data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Whether the role can generate reports */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
